childhood.familyBackground: Born into an upper-middle-class Gujarati Hindu Lohana family engaged in cotton trading. Grew up in a joint family of 60 people under one roof. Family was comfortable but not wealthy by Indian industrialist standards.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 면직물 거래에 종사하는 구자라트 힌두 로하나 가문의 중상류층 출생. 한 지붕 아래 60명이 사는 대가족에서 성장. 가족은 여유 있었으나 인도 산업가 기준으로 부유하지 않았음.
childhood.education: Bachelor of Commerce. MBA from Jamnalal Bajaj Institute of Management Studies in Mumbai — topped his class. Played competitive cricket in his youth.
childhood.educationKo: 상학사. 뭄바이 잠나랄 바자지 경영대학원 MBA — 수석 졸업. 청소년기 경쟁 크리켓 활동.
childhood.earlyLife: Born March 15, 1959. Turned down a lucrative multinational job offer in the early 1980s to start his own business when India was still a closed economy. In 1985, at age 26, set up Kotak Capital Management Finance with 3 million rupees ($164,000) borrowed from family and friends in the cotton business.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1959년 3월 15일 출생. 1980년대 초 인도가 폐쇄 경제이던 시절 다국적 기업의 좋은 일자리 제안을 거절하고 독자 창업. 1985년 26세에 면직물 거래 가족·친구에게 빌린 300만 루피($164,000)로 코탁캐피탈매니지먼트파이낸스 설립.
childhood.source: Wikipedia, Forbes, Bloomberg, StartupTalky, Brunswick Review

careerTimeline.event: Founded Kotak Capital Management Finance at age 26 with borrowed Rs 3 million; Anand Mahindra invested at his wedding reception
careerTimeline.eventKo: 26세에 빌린 300만 루피로 코탁캐피탈매니지먼트파이낸스 설립; 결혼식에서 아난드 마힌드라가 투자

careerTimeline.event: Kotak Mahindra Finance received India's first banking license from Reserve Bank of India — became Kotak Mahindra Bank
careerTimeline.eventKo: 코탁마힌드라파이낸스가 인도중앙은행에서 최초 은행 면허 취득 — 코탁마힌드라은행으로 전환

careerTimeline.event: Acquired rival ING Vysya Bank for $2.4 billion — major consolidation that nearly doubled his bank's scale
careerTimeline.eventKo: 경쟁사 ING 비샤 은행을 $24억에 인수 — 은행 규모를 거의 두 배로 키운 대형 통합

careerTimeline.event: Resigned as CEO of Kotak Mahindra Bank after leading it for 38 years; remained as non-executive director
careerTimeline.eventKo: 38년간 이끈 코탁마힌드라은행 CEO 사임; 비상근 이사로 잔류

careerTimeline.event: Forbes net worth $12.5B; Kotak Mahindra Bank is India's 3rd largest private bank by market cap with $68B+ in assets
careerTimeline.eventKo: Forbes 순자산 $125억; 코탁마힌드라은행 시총 기준 인도 3위 민간 은행, 자산 $680억+

failures.description: RBI forced Kotak to reduce his stake in the bank below 26% — regulatory battle over promoter shareholding limits that lasted years
failures.descriptionKo: 인도중앙은행이 코탁에게 은행 지분 26% 미만 축소 강제 — 수년간 지속된 창업자 지분 한도 규제 분쟁
failures.lesson: Even the most successful bank founders must eventually cede control as regulations tighten; Kotak's graceful step-down in 2023 showed mature governance evolution
failures.lessonKo: 가장 성공적인 은행 창업자도 규제 강화에 따라 결국 지배력 양보 필요; 코탁의 2023년 우아한 퇴진은 성숙한 거버넌스 진화를 보여줌

personalTraits.knownFor: Built India's 3rd largest private bank from $164,000 borrowed capital. First company to receive a banking license from RBI. Asia's richest banker. EY World Entrepreneur of the Year (2014). Known for conservative banking, starting from bills discounting and expanding to full banking, insurance, and asset management.
personalTraits.knownForKo: $164,000 차입금에서 인도 3위 민간 은행 구축. RBI 최초 은행 면허 취득 기업. 아시아 최고 부자 은행가. EY 세계 올해의 기업가(2014). 보수적 은행업, 어음 할인에서 은행·보험·자산관리로 확장한 것으로 유명.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and healthcare in India. Active in financial literacy programs. CII President (2020-21). Contributes to Mumbai civic and cultural initiatives.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 인도 교육·의료 지원. 금융 문해력 프로그램 활동. CII 회장(2020-21). 뭄바이 시민·문화 사업 기여.
personalTraits.controversies: Regulatory battles with RBI over promoter shareholding limits. Questions about whether banking license was granted due to political connections. Criticism of executive compensation at Kotak Mahindra Bank.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 창업자 지분 한도 관련 인도중앙은행과 규제 분쟁. 은행 면허가 정치적 인맥 덕분이었는지 의문. 코탁마힌드라은행 경영진 보상 비판.
